phenotypes.label: Fully Recovered / High Readiness
phenotypes.description: All major systems recovered. Supports high-intensity or high-force work.

phenotypes.label: Systemically Ready, Locally Fatigued
phenotypes.description: Autonomic recovery good but musculoskeletal system reduced. Aerobic or split-adjusted work recommended.

phenotypes.label: Muscularly Ready, Centrally Suppressed
phenotypes.description: Soreness minimal but HRV depressed, RHR elevated, or poor sleep. Easy movement only.

phenotypes.label: Sleep-Driven Suppression
phenotypes.description: Sleep/circadian restoration critically low. Lower complexity and moderate load limits.

phenotypes.label: Accumulated Training Fatigue
phenotypes.description: High strain over recent days with HRV lagging and moderate soreness. Reduced tolerance for intensity.

phenotypes.label: Under-Fueled / Under-Hydrated
phenotypes.description: Metabolic support insufficient. Nutritional recovery priority.

phenotypes.label: Illness Risk / Abnormal Physiology
phenotypes.description: Elevated RHR, depressed HRV, elevated respiratory rate. Recovery-only guidance with symptom screening.
